title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Blue Star India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Blue Star India
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
